name: Hocco Eau de Parfum
short: A sophisticated eau de parfum blending modern elegance with timeless depth in 100ml.
description: Hocco is a sophisticated eau de parfum that opens with a crisp, aromatic burst of bergamot and lavender, blooms into a spicy heart of cardamom and geranium, and settles into a warm, woody base of oud, sandalwood, and amber. Composed at high concentration for a refined, lasting sillage. Hand-filled and finished in our Udaipur atelier. A scent that moves easily from boardroom to evening — modern, confident, unmistakably elegant.
benefits: Weighted glass flacon with brass-tone cap
usage: Spritz onto pulse points — wrists, neck, behind the ears — from a distance of 6 inches. Do not rub. Reapply as desired. A versatile signature scent for day or evening.
